# claude_workspace_member (Resource)

A workspace member: a user assigned to a Claude workspace with a specific role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claude_workspace_member" "example" {
  workspace_id   = "wrkspc_0123456789abcdef"
  user_id        = "user_0123456789abcdef"
  workspace_role = "workspace_developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) Identifier of the user to add to the workspace. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `workspace_id` (String) Identifier of the workspace (`wrkspc_...`). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `workspace_role` (String) Role granted to the user within the workspace. One of `workspace_user`, `workspace_developer`, `workspace_admin`, or `workspace_billing`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier of the workspace member in the form `<workspace_id>/<user_id>`.
- `type` (String) Object type, always `workspace_member`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Workspace members can be imported using the composite "workspace_id/user_id" format.
terraform import claude_workspace_member.example wrkspc_xxx/user_xxx
```
